TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: blaq balay niqun kacing qu lmiquy hiya'. mha ni s'anan ta' na bngciq qu kacing mga, mutu skhikang na kacing ma. sraral hiya' ga, sqibuw ta slaq qu kacing hiya'. maniq inblequn tmahuk qu tapang na kacing ga blaq niqun uzi. lokah iyal qu uwiq na kacing hiya' ru siki lnggan.
S.PHON: ő≤laq ő≤alaj niqun ka ¶~ ®iŇč qu lmiquj ńßija Ē. mńßa ni s~…ē Ēanan ta Ē na ő≤Ňč ¶~ ®iq qu ka ¶~ ®iŇč m…£a, mutu s~…ēkńßikaŇč na ka ¶~ ®iŇč ma. s~…ēraral ńßija Ē …£a, s~…ēqiő≤uw ta s~…ēlaq qu ka ¶~ ®iŇč ńßija Ē. maniq inő≤lequn tmańßuk qu tapaŇč na ka ¶~ ®iŇč …£a ő≤laq niqun uzi. lokańß ijal qu uwiq na ka ¶~ ®iŇč ńßija Ē ru s~…ēiki lŇč…£an.
S.FORM: blaq balay niqun kacing qu lmiquy hiya'. mha ni s'anan ta' na bngciq qu kacing mga, mutu skhikang na kacing ma. sraral hiya' ga, sqibuw ta slaq qu kacing hiya'. maniq inblequn tmahuk qu tapang na kacing ga blaq niqun uzi. lokah iyal qu uwiq na kacing hiya' ru siki lnggan.
